markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kick off GrowthX's engagement with Bubble to improve AI search visibility and content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bubble is transitioning from no-code to AI-powered app development, launching key features like conversational editing and AI-generated mobile apps](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=625.0)
  - [Main goal: Increase share of voice in new competitive landscape (Lovable, Replit) and win "first build" for users](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [Content strategy needs to emphasize Bubble's unique full-stack capabilities and visual development of both front-end and back-end](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Team capacity (2 people) is main constraint; GrowthX to provide high-volume, quality content with strategic oversight](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

## Topics

### Bubble's Product Evolution

  - [Shifting from no-code to AI-powered app development](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [Launching conversational editing (Bubble AI Agent) in 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Introducing AI-generated mobile apps](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [Only platform for building web and mobile apps with same back-end](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1660.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [New main competitors: Lovable and Replit](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [Bubble differentiators: full-stack capabilities, visual development of front-end and back-end](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1466.0)
  - [Need to establish presence in "AI no-coding" category](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

### Content Strategy Goals

  - [Increase share of voice in new competitive space](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [Win "first build" for users](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Defend and expand on existing comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3130.0)
  - [Leverage AI-generated content for volume, focus on high-quality expertise pieces](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Integrate strategy across blog, social, YouTube, and potentially Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)

### Current Performance

  - [Majority of sign-ups and paid subscriptions come organically](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2773.0)
  - [CAC for subscription: $180-$200](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2738.0)
  - [Most users come through search, primarily branded](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2798.0)
  - [Rise in traffic from AI-related searches (e.g., ChatGPT reflexes)](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2784.0)

### Key Metrics and User Behavior

  - [Week one retention (day 8) is crucial indicator of long-term users](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2526.0)
  - [Users who engage with data tab (back-end) more likely to stick around](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=2546.0)
  - [Recent focus on "winning first build" to combat drop-off](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

### Content Review Process

  - [Deedi or Sara to give first pass on positioning, voice, accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3245.0)
  - [VP of Marketing likely to review initial pieces](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3281.0)
  - [GrowthX to calibrate over 4 weeks to align on output quality](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3313.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send "what we heard" summary and document requests](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3435.0)
  - [Bubble team to provide access to Google Search Console, Analytics, and CMS](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3441.0)
  - [GrowthX to develop writing guidelines, audience personas, and company context artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3463.0)
  - [Draft content strategy to be shared next week](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3481.0)
  - [Set up AI Visibility Dashboard (aiming for week 2)](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3567.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up on data ingestion and KPI tracking](https://fathom.video/share/4BhtjsiAAfFwVsPpxfoH7Jy-MG3aqtxH?tab=summary&timestamp=3388.0)
